In the Third House.—The sixth lord fortified confers
enmity with brothers. Or his maternal uncle befriending the
native's brother works against the native's interests or the
native's brother suffers from frequent ill-health. The 6th
lord weak and afflicted, the native will have no younger
brothers.
In the Fourth House.—Well fortified, lives in a
dilapidated building. He will have breaks in education and
will discard his mother. Maternal uncles will generally be
land cultivators. Weak and afflicted: he will quarrel with
his mother and ancestral property will be involved in debts.
He will work as a menial and lead a miserable life.
Troublesome home and domestic affairs and trouble
through servants.
In the Fifth House. — Sickly children. The native wil'
be adopted by his maternal uncle and become fortunate-
In the Sixth House. —Increase of cousins. Native's
maternal uncle becomes famed. If in conjunction with
weak Lagnadhipathi, he will suffer from an incurable
